hero.title: L칛thd톝 thi퍔n
hero.lead: IATF go퍔o퍔r톝 톝n 톢칬칬 ba gua퍔a퍔th 톝m톝 jak칛 thia퍔k, ba j톝 ku톝n, k칛 ba j톝 lu칛k k톝 톢칬칬 b톝 te thi퍔n k톝 t톝b-bu톖퍔톖퍔n, k톝n톝 톢칬칬 b톝 l칛t k톝 t톝kn톖l톖ji퍔 tin lu칛k naath.
support: K톝 kui퍔i퍔 k칛 톢칬칬 bi퍔 naath w톖퍔 thi퍔n r톝y int톝rn톝t, IATF la퍔td톝 [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) K칛 ta퍔a퍔d톝 r톝y l칛tni퍔d톝 cua 콂ie퍔e퍔c 톝 n톝y tin l칛t k톝톝 t톝kn톖l톖ji퍔ni퍔 tin lu칛kni퍔 naath.

header.title: Ruacni k톝 kui퍔i퍔 k칛 톢칬칬 /ci퍔 naath bi퍔 cop thi퍔n

paragraphs: Mi퍔 ci퍔 ji퍔n du톖퍔톖퍔r mi퍔 thi톝l lu톖t jek k칛 int톝rn톝t 톝m톝, l칛ri j톝 k톖 k톝 imei퍔l:
items: 톝n pa퍔j in ci퍔 ri톝k tu톖톖k thi퍔n
min lu칛k tekin칬l칬ji퍔, bra퍔th톝r, ki톝 ca퍔p in la퍔t k톝 ji퍔, mi lotd톝 r톖
report.footnote: Thi톝l톝 mi퍔 go퍔o퍔ri퍔 i퍔 bi퍔 ji퍔n 톝 g톖퍔a퍔r war톝gak k톝 kui퍔 gua퍔th in ci퍔 ri톝k tu톖톖k thi퍔n.

paragraphs: Ruaacni퍔 tin la퍔tk톝 k톝 kui퍔i퍔 k칛 톢칬칬 bi퍔 naath cop thi퍔n d칢칢 k톝 la퍔th gua퍔a퍔th t톖퍔톖퍔w칛 콂톖aani퍔 k톝 톢칬칬 d칢칢 k톝 riali퍔k칛 k톝 톢칬칬 /ci퍔 naath bi퍔 w톖퍔 nhiam.
Mi퍔 ci퍔 ri퍔o퍔lk칛du la퍔t k톝 kui퍔 콂톖aani퍔 tin ci퍔 r톖퍔톖퍔di톝n la퍔th thi퍔n, l칛ri j톝 r톝y ri퍔e퍔td칛.

header.kicker: Ta퍔a퍔 in t칛 thi퍔n 톝n t칛칛m톝
header.title: K톝n tin ca 콂a퍔c k칛 thi톝l lua퍔콂

paragraphs: Tha퍔a퍔콂 thuukni퍔 d톖퍔콂 /ci퍔k톝 bi퍔 cop gua퍔th in d칢칢 k톝 loc thi퍔n.
